name: Parallel HDF5 NetCDF Preflight
summary: Check parallel HDF5 and NetCDF MPI-IO build and runtime assumptions.
description: This skill helps users and support teams verify whether HDF5, NetCDF, MPI compiler wrappers, and MPI-IO launch settings are aligned before running data-intensive simulation, weather, climate, or analysis workloads on shared HPC filesystems.

tools.name: mpicc
tools.notes: Used to compile the optional NetCDF parallel I/O smoke test.

tools.name: h5pcc
tools.notes: Preferred HDF5 MPI compiler wrapper when available.

inputs.name: output_dir
inputs.description: Local directory where preflight reports and build plans should be written.

inputs.name: scratch_dir
inputs.description: Approved test directory on a filesystem suitable for tiny parallel I/O smoke outputs.

inputs.name: mpi_tasks
inputs.description: Small MPI task count for optional smoke tests.

outputs.name: parallel_io_preflight_report
outputs.description: Report with HDF5, NetCDF, MPI wrapper, and optional launcher evidence.

outputs.name: build_and_run_plan
outputs.description: Reviewable commands for compiling and running tiny parallel HDF5 and NetCDF smoke tests.

outputs.name: smoke_test_sources
outputs.description: Small C source files for HDF5 MPIO and NetCDF parallel access tests.

examples.title: Collect parallel HDF5 and NetCDF preflight evidence

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Check shell syntax without compiling or running MPI jobs.
On a test partition, compile with site HDF5/NetCDF modules and run each smoke test with a tiny task count on an approved scratch path.
